package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepositoryReturnsGormQueryBuilder() string {
    ruleID := "repository_returns_gorm_query_builder"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repositories that return partially built `*gorm.DB` chains for callers to finish."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
